name: stm32f103rct6_zephyr_hello_loop
notes: Portability validation: ZephyrBackend on STM32F103RCT6 (stm32f103_mini) via DAPLink/CMSIS-DAP — different chip family (F1 vs F4) and different instrument than the F4 Discovery pilot. Console on PA9 (USART1 TX) captured via DAPLink built-in UART bridge on /dev/ttyACM0. Custom openocd_cmsis_dap.cfg overrides stm32f103_mini default stlink-dap interface. Existing golden suite bench wiring reused (no changes needed).

flash._note: pyocd_direct requires a probe without the DAPLink FW 1.0 AP bank-switching bug (pyocd fails FAULT ACK on CSW after IDR read). On this bench, load.gdbmi via AEL is more reliable. pyocd_direct is provided as the correct mechanism for probes that support it.

instrument_roles.notes: DAPLink CMSIS-DAP via USB. SWD flash + built-in UART bridge for console capture.

serial_console.notes: DAPLink built-in USB UART bridge. PA9 (USART1_TX) → DAPLink RX. No separate USB-UART adapter needed.

peripheral_signals.notes: Zephyr console UART on stm32f103_mini DTS. Connected to DAPLink RX (existing golden suite wiring).

bench_setup._note: This is the existing stm32f103rct6 golden suite wiring. No changes needed from the last golden run.
